title: DiscretionaryFundingAward
description: A capital (and expense) funding award allocated by the Bronx Borough President to an organization or project. The Borough President receives a share of the city budget and directs it to community organizations and capital projects. Canonical schema reconciling the 'Bronx Borough President Capital Funding' Open Data dataset (mdgu-ar69, 20 columns). This is one of only two entities the office currently publishes as machine-readable data.

projectLocation.description: Site of the funded project ('Project Location').
